Package aim4.map

Class SpawnPoint

java.lang.Object
aim4.map.SpawnPoint
public class SpawnPoint extends Object
A spawn point.

  • Constructor Details

    • SpawnPoint

      public SpawnPoint(double currentTime, Point2D pos, double heading, double steeringAngle, double acceleration, Lane lane, Rectangle2D noVehicleZone, SpawnPoint.SpawnSpecGenerator vehicleSpecChooser)
      Create a spawn point.
      Parameters:
      currentTime - the current time
      pos - the initial position
      heading - the initial heading
      steeringAngle - the initial steering angle
      acceleration - the initial acceleration
      lane - the lane
      noVehicleZone - the no vehicle zone
      vehicleSpecChooser - the vehicle spec chooser

    • SpawnPoint

      currentTime - the current time
      pos - the initial position
      heading - the initial heading
      steeringAngle - the initial steering angle
      acceleration - the initial acceleration
      lane - the lane
      noVehicleZone - the no vehicle zone
